name: anthrosidian
description: LLM-driven Obsidian knowledge base: auto daily logging, wiki compilation, Q&A, work review, and URL ingestion from any project directory

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex sessions to an Obsidian knowledge base
interface.longDescription: Use Anthrosidian to write daily development logs, compile raw sources into wiki articles, answer questions from an Obsidian vault, review completed work, and audit wiki health from Codex.
defaultPrompt: Log this to my Obsidian daily note.
Search my Obsidian wiki for this topic.
Review my work from this week.
